mapper.select: SELECT textbook_id AS textbookId, COUNT(*) AS readingDuration FROM ( SELECT textbook_id, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM age(LEAD(add_datetime, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY creator, textbook_id ORDER BY add_datetime), add_datetime)) as diff_seconds FROM learning_log WHERE creator = (SELECT user_id FROM student WHERE id = #{studentId}) ) AS durations WHERE diff_seconds BETWEEN 55 AND 65 GROUP BY textbook_id ORDER BY readingDuration DESC

SELECT TO_CHAR(add_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS activity_date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM learning_log WHERE creator = #{userId} AND add_datetime BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY TO_CHAR(add_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD')

SELECT TO_CHAR(add_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS activity_date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM learning_notes WHERE creator = #{userId} AND add_datetime BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY TO_CHAR(add_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD')

SELECT TO_CHAR(add_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS activity_date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM teaching_question_bank-- 假设您的答题记录表是这个名字 WHERE creator = #{userId} AND add_datetime BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY TO_CHAR(add_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD')

SELECT tc.id as chapterId, tc.catalog_name as chapterName, tc.catalog_level as chapterLevel, tc.father_catalog_id as parentChapterId, COALESCE(student_stats.question_answering_duration, 0) as questionAnsweringDuration, COALESCE(student_stats.chapter_score, 0) as chapterScore, COALESCE(student_stats.correct_rate, 0) as correctRate, COALESCE(student_stats.total_questions, 0) as totalQuestions, COALESCE(student_stats.correct_answers, 0) as correctAnswers, COALESCE(student_stats.average_score, 0) as averageScore, COALESCE(reading_stats.reading_duration, 0) as readingDuration, COALESCE(student_stats.mastery_percentage, 0) as masteryPercentage FROM textbook_catalog tc LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计学生章节做题情况（参考chapter-question-correct-rate接口） SELECT tqb.textbook_catalog_id, COUNT(DISTINCT tqb.id) as questionBankCount, COUNT(sfg.id) as total_questions, -- 计算正确率：总得分 / 总满分 * 100 CASE WHEN SUM(qbl.total_score) > 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(sfg.final_score) / SUM(qbl.total_score)) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END as correct_rate, -- 统计正确作答次数（正确率 >= 60% 视为正确） SUM(CASE WHEN qbl.total_score > 0 AND (sfg.final_score / qbl.total_score) >= 0.6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as correct_answers, -- 计算平均得分 CASE WHEN COUNT(sfg.id) > 0 THEN ROUND(AVG(sfg.final_score), 2) ELSE 0 END as average_score, -- 计算章节得分（基于正确率） CASE WHEN SUM(qbl.total_score) > 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(sfg.final_score) / SUM(qbl.total_score)) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END as chapter_score, -- 计算掌握程度百分比（基于正确率和答题数量） CASE WHEN SUM(qbl.total_score) > 0 AND COUNT(sfg.id) > 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(sfg.final_score) / SUM(qbl.total_score)) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END as mastery_percentage, -- 估算做题时长（每题平均5分钟） CASE WHEN COUNT(sfg.id) > 0 THEN COUNT(sfg.id) * 5 ELSE 0 END as question_answering_duration FROM teaching_question_bank tqb LEFT JOIN ( SELECT bank_id, SUM(score) as total_score FROM questions_banks_list GROUP BY bank_id ) qbl ON tqb.id = qbl.bank_id LEFT JOIN student_final_grade sfg ON tqb.id = sfg.bank_id AND sfg.student_id = #{studentId} WHERE tqb.textbook_id = #{textbookId} AND tqb.status = 1 GROUP BY tqb.textbook_catalog_id ) student_stats ON tc.id = student_stats.textbook_catalog_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计学生章节阅读时长 SELECT t1.catalogue_id, COUNT(*) as reading_duration FROM ( SELECT ll.catalogue_id, ll.add_datetime, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ll.catalogue_id ORDER BY ll.add_datetime) as rn FROM learning_log ll WHERE ll.textbook_id = #{textbookId} AND ll.creator = ( SELECT user_id FROM student WHERE id = #{studentId} ) ) t1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ll.catalogue_id, ll.add_datetime, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ll.catalogue_id ORDER BY ll.add_datetime) as rn FROM learning_log ll WHERE ll.textbook_id = #{textbookId} AND ll.creator = ( SELECT user_id FROM student WHERE id = #{studentId} ) ) t2 ON t1.catalogue_id = t2.catalogue_id AND t1.rn = t2.rn - 1 WHERE t2.add_datetime IS NOT NULL AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM t2.add_datetime) - EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM t1.add_datetime) BETWEEN 55 AND 65 GROUP BY t1.catalogue_id ) reading_stats ON tc.id = reading_stats.catalogue_id WHERE tc.textbook_id = #{textbookId} ORDER BY tc.catalog_level, tc.sort

WITH UserLogsWithPrevious ( textbook_id, add_datetime, prev_textbook_id, prev_add_datetime ) AS ( -- 步骤1: 使用 LAG 窗口函数获取当前用户日志的上一条记录信息 SELECT textbook_id, add_datetime, -- 按用户分区(creator)，再按时间排序，确保获取的是同一个用户的上一条记录 LAG(textbook_id, 1) OVER ( PARTITION BY creator ORDER BY add_datetime ) AS prev_textbook_id, LAG(add_datetime, 1) OVER ( PARTITION BY creator ORDER BY add_datetime ) AS prev_add_datetime FROM learning_log WHERE creator = #{userId} ) -- 步骤2: 筛选出符合新学习开始条件的记录并计数 SELECT COUNT(*) FROM UserLogsWithPrevious WHERE textbook_id = #{textbookId} AND ( prev_add_datetime IS NULL -- 该用户的第一条记录 OR prev_textbook_id <> textbook_id -- 上一条是别的教材 OR TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, -- 两次记录间隔 > 60 秒 prev_add_datetime, add_datetime) > 60 )
SELECT DISTINCT ctl.textbook_id FROM student s JOIN course_class_list ccl on s.class_id = ccl.class_id JOIN course_textbook_list ctl on ccl.course_id = ctl.course_id where s.user_id = #{userId}
